allow: Bash(git commit -m 'fix: correct iOS build artifact path *)
Bash(git commit -m 'feat: build iOS IPA instead of Runner.app for easier distribution *)
Bash(git commit -m 'fix: upload entire ipa directory instead of glob pattern *)
Bash(git commit -m 'fix: use exact IPA filename Runner.ipa *)
Bash(git commit -m 'debug: add find command to locate IPA before upload *)
